steps.description: Click on the "Password" input field within the Microsoft login form to focus and enable password entry.
Type text ${{secret:M365_ACCOUNT_PASSWORD}}  into the password input field on the Microsoft login page
Click the "Sign in" button on the Microsoft login page to submit the entered password for account test04@atkesting05.onmicrosoft.com.

Click the "Yes" button on the Microsoft "Stay signed in?" prompt during the login process on login.microsoftonline.com, confirming the choice to remain signed in. The "Yes" button is highlighted in blue at the bottom right of the dialog.
